zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Poultney於1477年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas John Poultney35歲，母親Roisia Lucy35歲。她於1491年與William Fielding在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1539年9月8日在英國英格蘭享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾蒙可斯 科比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Poultney于1477年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Sir Thomas John Poultney35岁，母亲Roisia Lucy35岁。她于1491年与William Fielding在英国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1539年9月8日在英国英格兰享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾蒙可斯 科比。

nameMeanings.name: Poultney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pountney
meanings: English: locative name from Poultney (Leics), which is recorded as Pontenei in 1086 and Pulteney in 1220. The place-name derives from an Old English personal name * Pulta (genitive * Pultan) + Old English ēg ‘island, piece of dry ground in a fen’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Poultney was born in 1477, in Leicestershire, England, her father, Sir Thomas John Poultney, was 35 and her mother, Roisia Lucy, was 35. She married William Fielding in 1491, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 8 September 1539, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Monks Kirby, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Poultney est née en 1477, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas John Poultney, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Roisia Lucy, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé William Fielding en 1491, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 septembre 1539, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Monks Kirby, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Monks Kirby, Warwickshire, England, Unit: Monks Kirby, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Poultney 1477 in Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas John Poultney 35 und ihre Mutter Roisia Lucy 35. Sie hat 1491 in England William Fielding geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. September 1539 im Alter von 62 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Monks Kirby, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato William Fielding nel 1491, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 8 settembre 1539, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Monks Kirby, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Poultneyが1477年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas John Poultneyは35歳，母Roisia Lucyは35歳であった。1491年にイギリスでWilliam Fieldingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1539年9月8日にイギリスイギリスで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアモンクス キルビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Poultney(이)가 1477년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas John Poultney(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Roisia Lucy(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1491년 영국에서 William Fielding(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1539년 9월 8일 영국 잉글랜드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 몬크스 커비에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com William Fielding em 1491, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1539, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Monks Kirby, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Poultney родилась в 1477 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas John Poultney было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Roisia Lucy, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Fielding в 1491 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 8 сентября 1539 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности монкс кирби, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.
